title: Complete quiz and view route recommendation result
description: Verifies a user can complete the full quiz flow and reach a result screen showing a timeline and percentage.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the link to start the route recommendation quiz
Select the companion choice 나홀로 뚜벅이 (1인)
Proceed to the next step
Select the time choice 1~2시간
Proceed to the next step
Select the style choice 미션 완수형
Submit the quiz to generate a recommendation
Verify a matched travel timeline is displayed on the result screen
Verify a rounded percentage score is displayed on the result screen

title: Block submission when quiz is incomplete
description: Verifies the quiz cannot be submitted without making required selections and shows a validation state.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the link to start the route recommendation quiz
Proceed to the next step
Verify a selection validation error is visible and the flow does not advance

title: Prevent duplicate rapid submissions of the quiz
description: Verifies rapid repeated submissions are blocked so only one recommendation is processed.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the link to start the route recommendation quiz
Select any valid companion choice
Proceed to the next step
Select any valid time choice
Proceed to the next step
Select any valid style choice
Rapidly submit the quiz multiple times
Verify only one recommendation result view is shown (no duplicated result sections or repeated loading states)

title: Deterministic ordering when top places are tied
description: Verifies the result ordering remains consistent on repeated submissions with the same selections, indicating deterministic tie resolution.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the link to start the route recommendation quiz
Make a consistent set of selections across all quiz steps
Submit the quiz to generate a recommendation
Record the first two place names shown in the recommendation result
Click the control to restart the quiz from the result view or return to the quiz start
Make the same selections again across all quiz steps
Submit the quiz to generate a recommendation
Verify the first two place names in the result match the previously recorded order

title: Live data dashboard displays donut chart and ranking list
description: Verifies the home dashboard section renders popularity chart and rankings after scrolling.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll down on the home screen to the live data section
Verify a donut chart is displayed
Verify a ranking list of popular places is displayed

title: Live data dashboard remains stable after leaving and returning to home
description: Verifies the donut chart is re-rendered cleanly without duplicated artifacts when navigating away and back.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll down on the home screen to the live data section
Click the link to start the route recommendation quiz
Click the control to return to the home screen
Scroll down on the home screen to the live data section
Verify only one donut chart is displayed and the chart area shows no duplicated overlays or tooltips

title: Repeated away-and-back navigation does not create duplicated chart instances
description: Verifies repeated navigation cycles do not produce flicker or duplicated chart artifacts.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll down on the home screen to the live data section
Click the link to start the route recommendation quiz
Click the control to return to the home screen
Click the link to start the route recommendation quiz
Click the control to return to the home screen
Scroll down on the home screen to the live data section
Verify the donut chart and ranking list appear once each without duplicated visual artifacts
